title: NIT Rourkela Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
short_info: National Institute of Technology Rourkela (NIT Rourkela) Project Associate Notification 2026 has been released on 29-05-2026 on the official website www.nitrkl.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NIT Rourkela Project Associate Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years Age relaxation up to 5 years in the case of candidates belonging to Schedule Castes / Schedule Tribes / PWD and Female applicants whereas 3 years in the case of OBCs (Non-creamy layer candidates).

qualification.details: M.Sc./M.Tech. in Botany / Plant Science / Plant Biotechnology / Plant Pathology / Agricultural Biotechnology / Allied Plant Science disciplines with 60% marks or 6.50 CGPA in 10 point scale. NET or valid GATE qualification.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Rourkela Project Associate Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Rourkela Project Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the NIT Rourkela Project Associate (PA) recruitment is 15-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc./M.Tech. in Botany, Plant Science, Plant Biotechnology, Plant Pathology, Agricultural Biotechnology, or allied Plant Science disciplines with at least 60% marks or 6.50 CGPA, along with NET or valid GATE qualification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for the Project Associate position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Associate (PA) post is 28 years.

faq.question: Q4. Are there any age relaxations available for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is available up to 5 years for SC/ST/PWD candidates and female applicants, and 3 years for OBC (Non-creamy layer) candidates.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 37,000.

faq.question: Q6. How will candidates be selected for the Project Associate position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Associate (PA) position will be based on an Online Interview.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies for the Project Associate post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Project Associate (PA) post at NIT Rourkela.

faq.question: Q9. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is via email. Candidates need to send their application and documents to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is NITR / SR / 2026 / Advt. - 26LS008 / I / 031 dt. 29-May-2026.
